verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely We sent Noah to his people: ‘Warn your people before a painful punishment comes upon them.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: He said, ‘My people! I am a clear warner for you.

verses.quran_arabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: Serve God, and guard (yourselves) against Him, and obey me!

verses.quran_arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: He will forgive you your sins, and spare you until an appointed time. Surely the time of God, when it comes, cannot be postponed. If (only) you knew!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًۭا وَنَهَارًۭا
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, surely I have called my people night and day,

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًۭا
verses.text: but my calling has only increased them in flight.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًۭا
verses.text: Surely I – whenever I called them, so that You might forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, and covered themselves with their clothes, and persisted (in disbelief), and became very arrogant.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًۭا
verses.text: Then surely I called them publicly,

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًۭا
verses.text: then surely I spoke openly to them, and I confided to them in secret,

verses.quran_arabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًۭا
verses.text: and I said, “Ask forgiveness from your Lord, surely He is forgiving,

verses.quran_arabic: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًۭا
verses.text: and He will send the sky (down) on you in abundance,

verses.quran_arabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَٰلٍۢ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَٰرًۭا
verses.text: and increase you with wealth and sons, and make gardens for you, and make rivers for you.

verses.quran_arabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًۭا
verses.text: What is (the matter) with you that do not expect seriousness (of purpose) on the part of God,

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
verses.text: when He created you in stages?

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٍۢ طِبَاقًۭا
verses.text: Do you not see how God created seven heavens in stories,

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًۭا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًۭا
verses.text: and placed the moon in them as a light, and placed the sun (in them) as a lamp?

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًۭا
verses.text: And God caused you to grow from of the earth,

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًۭا
verses.text: (and) then He will return you into it, and bring you forth again.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًۭا
verses.text: God has made the earth an expanse for you,

verses.quran_arabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًۭا فِجَاجًۭا
verses.text: so that you may traverse its open (path)ways.”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ نُوحٌۭ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًۭا
verses.text: Noah said, ‘My Lord, surely they have disobeyed me, and followed one whose wealth and children increase him only in loss,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًۭا كُبَّارًۭا
verses.text: and they have schemed a great scheme,

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّۭا وَلَا سُوَاعًۭا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًۭا
verses.text: and said, “Do not forsake your gods, and do not forsake Wadd, nor Suwā’, nor Yaghūth, and Ya‘ūq, and Nasr.”

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًۭا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلًۭا
verses.text: And they have led many astray. Increase the evildoers only in going astray!’

verses.quran_arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًۭا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًۭا
verses.text: They were drowned on account of their sins, and forced to enter a fire, and they found they had no helpers other than God.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌۭ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
verses.text: Noah said, ‘My Lord, do not leave any of the disbelievers as an inhabitant on the earth.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًۭا كَفَّارًۭا
verses.text: Surely You – if You leave them, they will lead Your servants astray, and will give birth only to depraved disbeliever(s).

verses.quran_arabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًۭا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
verses.text: My Lord, forgive me and my parents, and whoever enters my house believing, and the believing men and the believing women, and increase the evildoers only in destruction!’
